Plot a module-score network

Source: R/visualization.R
plot_module_network.Rd

Draw a clean module network from module-score correlations. The function is designed for NestedWGCNA CGM/FGM score tables and follows WGCNA-style eigengene-network visualization principles.

Usage

plot_module_network(
  score_df,
  module_sizes = NULL,
  layer = "CGM",
  top_n = 12,
  cor_thr = 0.3,
  corr_method = c("spearman", "pearson"),
  layout_seed = 42,
  show_legend = TRUE
)

Arguments

score_df

Data frame or matrix (samples x modules) of module scores.

module_sizes

Optional named numeric vector of module sizes. Names must match colnames(score_df) (for example CGM_0, FGM_2).

layer

Layer label used in the title.

top_n

Maximum number of modules (highest variance) to include.

cor_thr

Correlation threshold for drawing edges.

corr_method

Correlation method.

layout_seed

Seed used by force-directed layouts.

show_legend

Whether to draw edge-sign legend.

Value

Invisibly returns the plotted correlation matrix.
